The '''TechMaster II Vacuum Suit''' was a type of [[Environment suit/Legends|vacuum suit]] manufactured by [[LifeLine Technologies]]. The suit cost a thousand [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]], and traded systems like [[temperature regulator]]s and [[waste recycler]]s for improved mobility. The gloves in particular were tight-fitting to allow for fine manipulation work while wearing the suit.<ref name="PSG" />

{{Clothes-stub}}
